news.paragraph: AMD is facing divided sentiment as Wall Street analysts split on the stock's valuation. While BofA has raised its price target to $500 amid enterprise AI expansion, other firms have issued downgrades due to valuation concerns. This divergence between AI growth potential and pricing skepticism provides a complex backdrop for near-term trading.
headlines: AMD, Under Armour downgraded: Wall Street's top analyst calls
